proofMetrics.title: Years of Hands-On Support
proofMetrics.text: Delivered day-to-day IT and security support across production environments.

proofMetrics.title: Operational Environments
proofMetrics.text: Supported both retail business operations and a multi-site academic institution.

proofMetrics.title: Core Focus Areas
proofMetrics.text: IT technician support, hardware repair, Red Team mindset, and IT security operations.

caseStudy.title: Mini Case Study: Operational Device Stability
caseStudy.problem: Frequent device and software issues interrupted operations and slowed daily workflows.
caseStudy.action: Applied structured troubleshooting, proactive checks, and accurate configuration documentation.
caseStudy.result: Improved service continuity with faster recovery and fewer repeated support issues.

impactCards.title: Hardware Diagnostics and Repair
impactCards.description: Diagnosed device failures, completed component replacements, and restored stable workstation performance.

impactCards.alt: IT security and account administration workflow
impactCards.title: IT Security and Account Administration
impactCards.description: Managed user accounts and permissions while applying security-first controls in Microsoft 365 and Active Directory.

impactCards.title: Network and Incident Troubleshooting
impactCards.description: Diagnosed and resolved hardware, software, and connectivity issues with clear escalation paths for complex incidents.

impactCards.alt: IT security automation and scripting workflow
impactCards.title: Security Automation and Scripting
impactCards.description: Applied Python and PowerShell to automate administrative checks and security-oriented reporting workflows.

impactCards.title: Records and Audit Readiness
impactCards.description: Maintained accurate system records, service logs, and asset documentation for operational integrity and traceability.
